title: Crispy Pepperoni Pizza Bites
description: Quick and easy appetizer perfect for game day or parties. Crispy on the outside, cheesy on the inside.
instructions: Cut pizza dough into 1-inch (2.5 cm) cubes.
Place dough cubes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with salt.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
While dough is baking, slice pepperoni into quarters.
Remove dough from oven and let cool for 1-2 minutes.
Top each dough cube with a spoonful of marinara sauce, a few slices of pepperoni, and a sprinkle of mozzarella cheese.
Return to oven and bake for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from oven and let cool for 1-2 minutes.
